mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visibility = 'PUBLIC' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_visit_daily ( stat_date, view_count, unique_count, direct_count, search_count, referral_count ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{viewDelta}, #{uniqueAbsolute}, #{directDelta}, #{searchDelta}, #{referralDelta} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE view_count = view_count + #{viewDelta}, unique_count = GREATEST(unique_count, #{uniqueAbsolute}), direct_count = direct_count + #{directDelta}, search_count = search_count + #{searchDelta}, referral_count = referral_count + #{referralDelta}
